title: Assessment of diseases on short-duration pigeonpea in Sri Lanka
abstract: Results of a survey are presented. The diseases present were yellow mosaic, pigeon pea sterility mosaic virus, Cercospora and Phyllosticta leaf spots, bacterial leaf spot, powdery mildew, Phytophthora blight and web blight., Results of a survey are presented. The diseases present were yellow mosaic, pigeon pea sterility mosaic virus, Cercospora and Phyllosticta leaf spots, bacterial leaf spot, powdery mildew, Phytophthora blight and web blight.
